title: Device(headset) is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Verify a newly paired headset appears in Poly Lens Cloud inventory after successful registration via the Poly Lens app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with no headsets connected.
2. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → General → Account and log in with valid credentials.
3. Go to the Lens server inventory page and verify the device list shows only the Mobile app.
4. Pair a new headset with the app via Bluetooth.
5. Refresh the Lens Cloud inventory page.
expected: The newly paired headset appears on the Lens Cloud inventory list alongside the Mobile app.
